ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county (FIPS code) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the county in square miles */,
  "urbanization_level" TEXT /* Measure of the county's urbanization level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total votes cast in the county */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes cast in the county */,
  "reporting" INTEGER /* Number of reporting precincts in the county */,
  "precincts" INTEGER /* Total number of precincts in the county */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year the election was held */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office being contested */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the county */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who participated in the election */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for voter registration for the election */,
  "election_day" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES counties ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate's party affiliation */,
  "running_mate" TEXT /* Name of the candidate's running mate */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Whether the candidate is the incumbent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate in the county */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "votes_per_capita" REAL /* Number of votes received per capita in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id", "candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_metadata" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the election data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "retrieved_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was retrieved */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the election data */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is released */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "dataset_id")
)
